title: LUIGI IS RUNNING OUT OF IDEAS
description: Can you believe it's been 20 years since this thing we call Youtube Poop was first put on Youtube?  I can't.  That's fucked up.  Luigi can't either.  So I had to slap something together for it because that would be very sad of me to not acknowledge it like I often do.  Unlike most, you may be shocked and/or thrilled to find out I have not improved at making these videos in any conceivable way since 2006, but on the positive side consider it a fun time capsule of the era.  Or not fun.  Remember when Youtube Poop was good?  Youtube Poop was never good.
